texto: Some political leaders in the world make big mistakes but they never resign
autor: some make a small mistake but they immediately resign! What makes a political leader to resign or not to resign has something to do with having an honour or not! Those who have honour always choose the honourable way: Resignation!
explicacao: Citação de some make a small mistake but they immediately resign! What makes a political leader to resign or not to resign has something to do with having an honour or not! Those who have honour always choose the honourable way: Resignation! sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Some political leaders in the world make big mistakes but they never resign” articula lideranca, mehmet-murat-ildan, reflexao em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
